result.stdout:
Description:
  MDDBooster Console Application - M3L Parser and Code Generator with SQL Server Cascade Path Validation

Usage:
  MDDBooster.ConsoleApp [options]

Options:
  --settings <settings>  Path to the settings JSON file
  --input <input>        Path to the M3L input file
  --output <output>      Path to the output directory
  --builder <builder>    Builder type (DatabaseProject, ModelProject, ServerProject) [default: DatabaseProject]
  --version              Show version information
  -?, -h, --help         Show help and usage information
